_doc: Patterns for Django stack — pytest output, Django admin login, Django RPC-style POST endpoints, ORM lifecycle, signals, DRF serializers, Celery tasks. Stack-detection: presence of `manage.py` in project root. Pattern engine loads ALL *.json regardless of stack; project teams scope out unused patterns by deleting/renaming files. Public PR welcome — add patterns idiomatic to your codebase.

patterns.template:
# Django admin login via /admin/login/.
        page.goto(BASE + '/admin/login/')
        page.fill('input[name=username]', LOGIN)
        page.fill('input[name=password]', PASSWORD)
        page.click('button[type=submit]')
        page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle', timeout=15000)
